opportunities.name: UniCredit
opportunities.verdict: Solid business with 16.8% return on equity. Trading at a meaningful discount to sector peers (P/E 8.7x vs sector 12.4x). 5.2% dividend yield adds income appeal. 23% below its 52-week high — potential entry opportunity.

opportunities.name: Banca Monte dei Paschi
opportunities.verdict: Adequate business (13.0% ROE). Trading at a meaningful discount to sector peers (P/E 4.9x vs sector 12.4x). 11.5% dividend yield adds income appeal. has pulled back 20% from recent highs.

opportunities.name: Vanguard FTSE All-World High Div
opportunities.verdict: Cost data unavailable. Large, highly liquid fund ($11.5bn AUM). Strong 1-year return of 18.1%.

opportunities.name: Intesa Sanpaolo
opportunities.verdict: Adequate business (14.3% ROE). Trading at a meaningful discount to sector peers (P/E 8.9x vs sector 12.4x). 7.5% dividend yield adds income appeal. has pulled back 17% from recent highs.

opportunities.name: iShares Core EM IMI
opportunities.verdict: Cost data unavailable. Large, highly liquid fund ($41.4bn AUM). Strong 1-year return of 23.3%.

watchlist.name: iShares Euro Dividend

watchlist.name: Huntington Bancshares
watchlist.verdict: Adequate business (10.1% ROE). Modestly below sector median on P/E (10.8x vs 12.4x). 4.1% dividend yield adds income appeal. 21% below its 52-week high — potential entry opportunity.

watchlist.name: Regions Financial
watchlist.verdict: Adequate business (11.7% ROE). Modestly below sector median on P/E (10.9x vs 12.4x). 4.2% dividend yield adds income appeal. has pulled back 18% from recent highs.
